thought.text: I will now create the task list for this development stage, breaking down the work into structured phases.

task_list.title: Phase 0 — Multi-tenancy gate
task_list.notes: Verify and install multi-tenancy if not already present.

task_list.title: Phase A — Generate feature models
task_list.notes: Generate models from blueprints, edit model files, register resources, and run migrations.

task_list.title: Phase B — Implement Extras
task_list.notes: Implement custom scopes, callbacks, policies, and seed data.

task_list.title: Phase C — Verify
task_list.notes: Verify multi-tenant runtime, run API smoke tests, and perform AC sweep.

task_list.title: Phase D — Write tests for the backend
task_list.notes: Write unit and integration tests, run tests, and fix any failures.

tool_call.name: task_tracker
tool_call.arguments: {"security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Create the task list for the development stage", "command": "plan", "task_list": [{"title": "Phase 0 — Multi-tenancy gate", "notes": "Verify and install multi-tenancy if not already present.", "status": "in_progress"}, {"title": "Phase A — Generate feature models", "notes": "Generate models from blueprints, edit model files, register resources, and run migrations.", "status": "todo"}, {"notes": "Implement custom scopes, callbacks, policies, and seed data.", "title": "Phase B — Implement Extras", "status": "todo"}, {"status": "todo", "title": "Phase C — Verify", "notes": "Verify multi-tenant runtime, run API smoke tests, and perform AC sweep."}, {"notes": "Write unit and integration tests, run tests, and fix any failures.", "title": "Phase D — Write tests for the backend", "status": "todo"}]}

summary: Create the task list for the development stage
